text_body.plain_text: Market Definition / Scope and Cost Funnel

runs.text: Scope and Cost Funnel | Sizing starts at new-construction budget lines and narrows to non-GFE Basic Construction, not total ship cost.

text_body.plain_text: Scope and Cost Funnel | Sizing starts at new-construction budget lines and narrows to non-GFE Basic Construction, not total ship cost.

runs.text: Then-year $B. Each funnel narrows total ship cost to the non-GFE Basic Construction base. DDG FY2024 illustrative; submarine FY2022–FY2027 portfolio.

text_body.plain_text: Then-year $B. Each funnel narrows total ship cost to the non-GFE Basic Construction base. DDG FY2024 illustrative; submarine FY2022–FY2027 portfolio.

runs.text: Basic Construction is the included denominator.

The sizing base is $3.32B of DDG's $5.49B FY2024 estimate and $56.65B of the submarine portfolio's $83.79B. This base funds yard labor, team-build work, purchased material, and first- and lower-tier supplier flow.

text_body.plain_text:
Basic Construction is the included denominator.
The sizing base is $3.32B of DDG's $5.49B FY2024 estimate and $56.65B of the submarine portfolio's $83.79B. This base funds yard labor, team-build work, purchased material, and first- and lower-tier supplier flow.

runs.text: GFE, other budget categories, and yard self-perform leave the boundary.

Government-furnished propulsion, electronics, and ordnance are removed, along with submarine plans, HM&E, change orders, nuclear reactor plant, SIB capacity grants, prime and co-prime yard self-perform, and sustainment.

text_body.plain_text:
GFE, other budget categories, and yard self-perform leave the boundary.
Government-furnished propulsion, electronics, and ordnance are removed, along with submarine plans, HM&E, change orders, nuclear reactor plant, SIB capacity grants, prime and co-prime yard self-perform, and sustainment.

runs.text: Top-of-funnel context and first-tier filings are evidence, not numerator.

Total ship estimate and TOA frame the denominator; FFATA/FSRS subawards are a visible floor behind the supplier coefficient. Do not add AP/LLTM on top of the BC base inside this funnel; the DDG-only filtered AP/LLTM stream is handled separately.

text_body.plain_text:
Top-of-funnel context and first-tier filings are evidence, not numerator.
Total ship estimate and TOA frame the denominator; FFATA/FSRS subawards are a visible floor behind the supplier coefficient. Do not add AP/LLTM on top of the BC base inside this funnel; the DDG-only filtered AP/LLTM stream is handled separately.

runs.text: Sources: (1) submarine SCN budget exhibits and Basic Construction cost-funnel data, FY2022–FY2027; (2) DDG FY2024 shipbuilding budget justification chart data, section 1; (3) Navy P-5c GFE and Basic Construction breakouts

text_body.plain_text: Sources: (1) submarine SCN budget exhibits and Basic Construction cost-funnel data, FY2022–FY2027; (2) DDG FY2024 shipbuilding budget justification chart data, section 1; (3) Navy P-5c GFE and Basic Construction breakouts
